lines.speaker: Bravek
lines.text: Thanks again for the hangover cure.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not a problem, happy to help out.

lines.speaker: Bravek
lines.text: I'm just having a little drop of whisky, then I'll feel really good.

lines.speaker: Bravek
lines.text: Hello there. Can't stop to talk I'm afraid, I've been left with a lot of work to do thanks to those mourners.
